overall.description: A ship simulation showing the view from the bridge of a cargo vessel navigating through open water at dusk. The camera faces forward over the bow with navigation monitors visible overhead, displaying radar and chart data as the ship moves steadily through the waves.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge forward view of open ocean

agents.ego_description: piloting the ship from the bridge, monitoring the navigation displays while maintaining course through open water

entered.detail: Navigation display showing chart plotter with yellow landmasses on blue background
Circular radar screen with rotating sweep displaying contacts and range rings
Depth sounder display showing orange-brown bottom profile with depth readings
Red-painted forward deck of the cargo ship with anchor equipment and railings
Open water with small waves extending to the horizon under dark sky
Left bridge window frame and support pillar
Right bridge window frame and support pillar

segments.scene_description: View from the bridge of a cargo ship navigating through open water during low light conditions. The forward deck and railings are visible below three navigation monitors displaying radar, chart, and depth data, while the ship maintains steady course through the moderate seas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady forward perspective from the bridge of a cargo ship as it navigates through open water under low-light conditions. It begins with a view over the forward deck and railings, where the ship cuts through moderate seas. As the vessel maintains its course, the focus remains on the interaction between the dark ocean surface and the glowing navigation monitors overhead. The scene concludes with the continuous display of radar, chart, and depth data guiding the ship through the dim evening light.
